whatsnew: Auto-export reports now default to OFF — enable per-format in Settings > Auto-Export Reports
What's New popup: 'Don't show this again' checkbox; toggle also available in Settings > Notifications
Server Mode startup: overlay now shows informational message instead of blank screen
Maturity Roadmap hidden from navigation — page pending next-phase redesign
New dashboards: Query Store Health, Database Health, and enhanced Backup Health with checksum and restore tracking
Live Stats: Top 10 wait types by average and total wait time, with colour-coded severity gradients
Nav sidebar: colour-coded sections (Audits, Tools, Live, SQLWATCH, PM) with per-section icon tints
DataGrid: new text-match column colour mode for string-based cell highlighting
